title: Listen: How I Wrote Myself into a Real-life Romantic Comedy – That Turned into a Survivalist Thriller

full_text:
We’ve been having so much fun with our Narratively Out Loud podcast lately. In case you missed it, our most recent memoir stories—about a domineering dad, one teenager’s rush to lose her virginity, and a black market IVF drug deal—are also available in audio format, read by the writers themselves. Just click play at the top of each story for the audio version, or find Narratively Out Loud on Spotify, Apple, or your fave podcast player.

Today we’re sharing one our of all-time favorite author-read stories, a hilarious true-life rom-com gone wrong from the very talented Melissa Johnson.

Happy listening!

And of course, if you’d rather read than listen, you can check out the story here:
